16 Oct 2025
Microsoft recently announced a major leadership shake-up that marks a turning point for the company’s future in artificial intelligence. CEO Satya Nadella has restructured Microsoft’s top ranks to focus more closely on technical innovation — from AI systems and product design to global data centre expansion. Judson Althoff, Microsoft’s longtime sales chief, has been promoted to CEO of the Commercial Business, overseeing sales, marketing, and operations. The move allows Nadella to dedicate his time to what he calls a “tectonic AI platform shift.” With rivals like Google, Meta, and OpenAI pushing forward in AI development, Microsoft’s internal restructuring signals a renewed focus on innovation and leadership in the next phase of the AI race.
